hero.title: We build and care
hero.body: Local company from Nelas with over 15 years delivering civil construction, renovations and exterior cleaning in Viseu, Mangualde and the entire central region. Close professionals. Guaranteed results.
index.about_title: A local company with proven work and a reputation to uphold.
index.about_body: We are a Portuguese team specialised in civil construction and exterior cleaning. We work with private clients, businesses and condominiums across the Viseu region, with a simple commitment: deliver quality work, on time, with no surprises.
index.services_title: Everything you need to build and care for your property.
index.area_body: We serve clients across the central region. Fast response, no extra travel costs within our service area.

whyus.title: Professionalism you feel in every detail.
whyus.item1_desc: Over 15 years delivering work with recognised quality.
whyus.item2_desc: Written warranty on all services performed.
whyus.item3_desc: We meet deadlines and agreed schedules.
whyus.item4_desc: A dedicated person in charge for every project.

process.title: A simple process, from first contact to delivery.
process.subtitle: Transparency at every step. No surprises, no hidden costs.
process.step1_desc: Reach us by phone, email or form.
process.step2_desc: We assess the site with no commitment.

team.label: Our team
team.title: The people behind every project.
team.body: Founded by two brothers passionate about construction, IJ Santos is a family business rooted in Nelas with completed work across the entire central region.
footer.description: — Civil construction and exterior cleaning with rigour, serving clients in the central region of Portugal for over 15 years.
cookie.banner_body: We use cookies to improve your experience. You can accept all, reject or customise your preferences. Learn more in the
cookie.modal_subtitle: Find detailed information about each consent category.
cookie.modal_body1: Cookies categorised as 'Necessary' are stored in your browser as they are essential for enabling the basic functions of the site.
cookie.modal_body2: We also use third-party cookies that help analyse how you use this site, store your preferences and provide relevant content. These cookies will only be stored with your prior consent.
cookie.necessary_desc: Necessary for activating the basic functions of this site, such as providing secure login or adjusting consent preferences. They do not store any personal identification data.
cookie.functional_desc: Help perform functions such as sharing content on social networks, collecting feedback and other third-party features.
cookie.analytics_desc: Used to understand how visitors interact with the site (number of visitors, bounce rate, traffic source, etc.).
cookie.performance_desc: Used to understand and analyse the key performance indicators of the site, delivering a better user experience.
cookie.advertising_desc: Used to provide visitors with personalised advertisements based on previously visited pages and to analyse the effectiveness of campaigns.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's talk about your project.
contact.body: Fill in the form or contact us directly. We respond to all requests within 24 hours, with a free quote and no commitment.
portfolio.label: Portfolio
portfolio.title: Works that speak for themselves.
portfolio.body: We turn challenges into solid structures. Discover a selection of works by IJ Santos in warehouses, shops, infrastructure, public works and residential construction.
servicos.label: Services
servicos.title: Complete solutions to build, renovate and maintain.
servicos.body: From new builds to exterior maintenance, we offer a range of services delivered with rigour, quality materials and experienced professionals.
servicos.limpeza_subtitle: Restore the shine to your property.
servicos.not_found_title: Can't find the service you're looking for?
servicos.not_found_subtitle: Contact us — we make personalised proposals.
sobre.label: About us
sobre.title: Building well is a matter of principle.
sobre.body: We are a Portuguese family business that grew project by project, client by client. Over 15 years later, we continue doing what we do best: honest work.
sobre.story_title: Over a decade of completed work.
sobre.story_body1: IJ Santos was born from a passion for construction and quality work. We started with small renovation projects and grew naturally — always through word of mouth from satisfied clients.
sobre.story_body2: Today, we are a multidisciplinary team combining civil construction with exterior cleaning services, offering a complete response to private individuals, businesses and condominiums across the central region.
sobre.mission_text: To deliver projects and services with proven quality, respecting deadlines, budgets and the trust that clients place in us.
sobre.vision_text: To be the local reference in construction and exterior cleaning, recognised for professionalism, competence and proximity.
sobre.values_text: Honesty, technical rigour, respect for the client and pride in the work we put our name to.
sobre.value1_desc: We keep our promises. No small print.
sobre.value3_desc: We treat every client as if they were the only one.
service_detail.area_suffix: in Nelas, Viseu and central region

services.construcao-civil.title: Civil Construction
services.construcao-civil.short: New construction works executed with rigour, on time and with quality.
services.construcao-civil.description: Residential and commercial construction projects, from foundations to finishes, with experienced teams and trusted materials.
services.construcao-civil.benefits.0.des: Professionals with ongoing training and proven experience.
services.construcao-civil.benefits.1.des: Detailed planning and efficient project management.
services.construcao-civil.benefits.2.des: We only work with trusted suppliers.
services.construcao-civil.benefits.3.des: A site manager always available for you.
services.construcao-civil.process.3.desc: Final inspection and written warranty for the completed work.
services.construcao-civil.faq.0.a: Yes, we manage the entire process with the municipality and other authorities.
services.construcao-civil.faq.1.q: How quickly do I receive the quote?
services.construcao-civil.faq.1.a: After the technical visit, we deliver the proposal within 3 to 5 working days.
services.construcao-civil.faq.2.a: All works come with a written warranty in accordance with current legislation.
services.remodelacoes-reabilitacao.title: Renovations & Rehabilitation
services.remodelacoes-reabilitacao.short: Renovate your space with modern and long-lasting solutions.
services.remodelacoes-reabilitacao.descr: Specialists in full or partial renovations — kitchens, bathrooms, interiors and rehabilitation of older buildings.
services.remodelacoes-reabilitacao.benef: From demolition to final decoration, we handle everything.
Proposals tailored to your style and budget.
Organised work and daily site cleaning.
Modern finishes that increase the value of your home.
services.remodelacoes-reabilitacao.proce: We understand your vision and needs.
We present materials, solutions and costs.
Scheduled by room to reduce disruption.
Home ready to use, with no loose ends.
services.remodelacoes-reabilitacao.faq.0: Can I keep living in the house?
Whenever possible we organise the work in phases to minimise disruption.
services.remodelacoes-reabilitacao.faq.1: Yes, we work with partner architects for a coherent result.
Painting of interiors, facades, balconies and metal structures with careful surface preparation.
Sanding, filling and primer for a lasting result.
Recognised brands and colours of your choice.
We carefully cover furniture and floors.
We identify damp, cracks and defects.
Even coats with the right technique.
We hand over the space ready to use.
What type of paints do you use?
We use high-coverage water-based paints, eco-friendly and washable.
Yes, we apply samples on the wall to validate the colour in natural light.
services.limpeza-fachadas.title: Facade Cleaning
services.limpeza-fachadas.short: Restore your facade to its original condition.
services.limpeza-fachadas.description: Professional facade cleaning with high-pressure equipment and specific products that remove dirt, fungi and pollution without damaging materials.
services.limpeza-fachadas.benefits.0.des: Visible difference from the first metre treated.
services.limpeza-fachadas.benefits.1.des: Pressure calibrated for each surface type.
services.limpeza-fachadas.benefits.2.des: Optional application to extend the effect.
services.limpeza-fachadas.benefits.3.des: Height work with all regulations complied with.
services.limpeza-fachadas.process.0.desc: We identify the type of dirt and materials.
services.limpeza-fachadas.process.1.desc: Scaffolding, elevated platforms or rope access.
services.limpeza-fachadas.process.3.desc: Optional application of water repellent or anti-fungal.
services.limpeza-fachadas.faq.0.q: Do you work on tall buildings?
services.limpeza-fachadas.faq.0.a: Yes, we have a certified team for height work.
services.limpeza-fachadas.faq.1.q: Does the building need to be vacated?
services.limpeza-fachadas.faq.1.a: No, the work is done from the outside without disturbing the occupants.
services.limpeza-fachadas.faq.2.a: It depends on the area and condition of the facade — on average 2 to 5 days.
services.limpeza-telhados.title: Roof Cleaning and Treatment
services.limpeza-telhados.description: Removal of moss, lichens and accumulated dirt, followed by anti-fungal treatment and waterproofing to extend the useful life of the roof.
services.limpeza-telhados.benefits.1.des: A clean roof reflects sunlight better.
services.limpeza-telhados.process.0.desc: We assess condition, slope and materials.
services.limpeza-telhados.process.3.desc: Optional application of colourless water repellent.
services.limpeza-telhados.faq.0.q: How often should it be cleaned?
services.limpeza-telhados.faq.0.a: We recommend every 5 to 7 years, depending on exposure.
services.limpeza-telhados.faq.1.a: Yes, we identify and replace tiles during the intervention.
services.limpeza-pavimentos-exteriores.s: Patios, pavements and car parks like new.
services.limpeza-pavimentos-exteriores.d: Professional pressure washing of stone, concrete, Portuguese pavement, decking and other exterior floor materials.
services.limpeza-pavimentos-exteriores.b: Oils, moss, stains and urban grime.
Reduces the risk of falls on slippery surfaces.
services.limpeza-pavimentos-exteriores.p: Each floor type requires a specific technique.
Application of products to loosen dirt.
services.limpeza-pavimentos-exteriores.f: Is it safe for delicate floors?
Yes, we adjust the pressure and products to the type of material.
Yes, we offer periodic maintenance contracts.
